trait.name: Way of the Crow
trait.effect: Before you attack a foe, you may consume a negative status token on your foe to deal +2 damage on hit. You may consume 3 negative statuses to also grant the attack piercing. If an attack powered up this way defeats your foe, clear a negative status on yourself, then gain shield.

basicAttack.name: Furor
basicAttack.effect:
Attack: 2 damage. Hit: +1d6.
On hit 2 vigor. If you or your target is in crisis, deals damage [+] and double vigor gain.

limitBreak.name: Bloodbath
limitBreak.effect:
Your skill at looting corpses has given you more than quick fingers - it has given you an intimate knowledge of both killing implements and where best to poke them.
Stance in this stance, gain aura 1.
• All foes in the aura count as bloodied, and bloodied foes count as being in crisis.
• The first time in a round a foe is defeated in the aura, yourself and all allies in the aura gain 1d3 vigor and can clear a negative status.

keywords.name: Finishing Blow
keywords.description: Gains additional effects if targeting a bloodied foe or a foe in crisis.
